name: John Doe

clinical_history.entry: Patient reports intermittent resting tremor in right hand, onset approximately 6 months ago. Denies bradykinesia or rigidity subjectively.
Follow-up. Tremor persisting. Referred for neurology consult. UPDRS Part III not yet completed.
Neurology consult pending. Patient agreed to participate in KeyDx digital screening.

risk_factors: 30+ years agricultural work with documented Paraquat herbicide exposure
Rural NJ, higher environmental pesticide index
Male sex, 1.5x higher PD incidence vs female
